## Associated Tutorial

This workflows is part of the tutorial [Introduction to Galaxy as an RDM platform](https://training.galaxyproject.org/training-material/topics/introduction/tutorials/galaxy-intro-rdm/tutorial.html), available in the [GTN](https://training.galaxyproject.org)

## Features

* Includes [Galaxy Workflow Tests](https://training.galaxyproject.org/training-material/faqs/gtn/workflow_run_test.html)
* Includes a [Galaxy Workflow Report](https://training.galaxyproject.org/training-material/faqs/galaxy/workflows_report_view.html)
